---
title: "Test R JSON"
format: docx
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
if (!requireNamespace("jsonlite", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("jsonlite", repos="http://cran.us.r-project.org")
library(jsonlite)
library(flextable)

json_data <- r"([
  {"Name": "Test's Name", "Value": "100"},
  {"Name": "Another \"Test\"", "Value": "200"}
])"

df <- jsonlite::fromJSON(json_data)
ft <- flextable(df)
ft <- bg(ft, bg = "#FFD966", part = "header")
ft
```
